svg.title: Raspberry Pi to M74HC4066 to KLF 050 wiring diagram
svg.desc: Wiring diagram showing the connection between a Raspberry Pi 40-pin GPIO header, two M74HC4066 quad analog switch ICs, and two KLF 050 remote controls. IC1 controls a blind cover via GPIO 9/10/11 (SPI pins). IC2 controls a window cover via GPIO 23/24/25. Both ICs are powered from 3.3V (pin 1) and GND (pin 6).
